query:
UPDATE panel_settings
            SET panel_port = ?,
                panel_base_path = ?,
                sub_enabled = ?,
                sub_host_override = ?,
                sub_update_interval_hours = ?,
                sub_brand_name = ?,
                sub_service_url = ?,
                sub_port = ?,
                updated_at = datetime('now')
            WHERE id = 1
